mapper.sql: id, request_id, pki_request_id, cert_sn, vin, binding_id, part_id, device_category, device_sn, certificate_profile, csr_fingerprint, subject, issuer, certificate_fingerprint, not_before, not_after, cert_status, issued_at, confirmed_at, fail_reason, source_system, facility_no, line_code, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_veh_certificate ( id, request_id, pki_request_id, cert_sn, vin, binding_id, part_id, device_category, device_sn, certificate_profile, csr_fingerprint, subject, issuer, certificate_fingerprint, not_before, not_after, cert_status, issued_at, confirmed_at, fail_reason, source_system, facility_no, line_code, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{requestId}, #{pkiRequestId}, #{certSn}, #{vin}, #{bindingId}, #{partId}, #{deviceCategory}, #{deviceSn}, #{certificateProfile}, #{csrFingerprint}, #{subject}, #{issuer}, #{certificateFingerprint}, #{notBefore}, #{notAfter}, #{certStatus}, #{issuedAt}, #{confirmedAt}, #{failReason}, #{sourceSystem}, #{facilityNo}, #{lineCode}, #{description}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tb_veh_certificate t SET
t.request_id = #{requestId},
t.pki_request_id = #{pkiRequestId},
t.cert_sn = #{certSn},
t.vin = #{vin},
t.binding_id = #{bindingId},
t.part_id = #{partId},
t.device_category = #{deviceCategory},
t.device_sn = #{deviceSn},
t.certificate_profile = #{certificateProfile},
t.csr_fingerprint = #{csrFingerprint},
t.subject = #{subject},
t.issuer = #{issuer},
t.certificate_fingerprint = #{certificateFingerprint},
t.not_before = #{notBefore},
t.not_after = #{notAfter},
t.cert_status = #{certStatus},
t.issued_at = #{issuedAt},
t.confirmed_at = #{confirmedAt},
t.fail_reason = #{failReason},
t.source_system = #{sourceSystem},
t.facility_no = #{facilityNo},
t.line_code = #{lineCode},
t.description = #{description},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_veh_certificate t WHERE t.id = #{value}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tb_veh_certificate t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1
SELECT FROM tb_veh_certificate t WHERE t.row_valid = 1 AND t.request_id = #{requestId} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM tb_veh_certificate t WHERE t.row_valid = 1 AND t.cert_sn = #{certSn} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM tb_veh_certificate t WHERE t.row_valid = 1 AND t.pki_request_id = #{pkiRequestId} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM tb_veh_certificate t WHERE t.row_valid = 1 AND t.vin = #{vin} AND t.device_category = #{deviceCategory} AND t.cert_status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY t.id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM tb_veh_certificate t WHERE t.row_valid = 1 AND t.device_sn = #{deviceSn} AND t.certificate_profile = #{certificateProfile} AND t.cert_status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY t.id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM tb_veh_certificate t WHERE t.row_valid = 1 AND t.device_sn = #{deviceSn} ORDER BY t.id DESC
SELECT FROM tb_veh_certificate t WHERE t.row_valid = 1 AND t.vin = #{vin} ORDER BY t.id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_veh_certificate t SET t.cert_status = #{toStatus}, t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE t.request_id = #{requestId} AND t.cert_status = #{fromStatus} AND t.row_valid = 1
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_veh_certificate t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
